ast.source: Stay up to date with the latest news and updates about our product by following us on Twitter:
ast.target: 关注我们的 Twitter，随时获取关于我们产品的最新消息和更新：

ast.name: error
ast.source: This browser lacks typed array (Uint8Array) support which is required by `buffer` v5.x. Use `buffer` v4.x if you require old browser support.
ast.target: 此浏览器缺少 `buffer` v5.x 所需的类型化数组（Uint8Array）支持。如需旧版浏览器支持，请使用 `buffer` v4.x。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] The `destroy` method will be unsupported in a future version. Instead use unsubscribe function returned by subscribe. Everything will be garbage-collected if store is garbage-collected.
ast.target: [DEPRECATED] `destroy` 方法将在未来版本中不再受支持。请改用 subscribe 返回的 unsubscribe 函数。如果 store 被垃圾回收，一切都会被垃圾回收。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] Use `createWithEqualityFn` instead of `create` or use `useStoreWithEqualityFn` instead of `useStore`. They can be imported from 'zustand/traditional'. https://github.com/pmndrs/zustand/discussions/1937
ast.target: [DEPRECATED] 使用 `createWithEqualityFn` 代替 `create`，或使用 `useStoreWithEqualityFn` 代替 `useStore`。它们可以从 'zustand/traditional' 导入。https://github.com/pmndrs/zustand/discussions/1937

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [DEPRECATED] Passing a vanilla store will be unsupported in a future version. Instead use `import { useStore } from 'zustand'`.
ast.target: [DEPRECATED] 传入原生 store 将在未来版本中不再受支持。请改用 `import { useStore } from 'zustand'`。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warnning: Don't worry, to prevent data loss, conflicting files will generate a .conflict.md backup file with the overwritten content to your local folder.
ast.target: Warnning: 别担心，为防止数据丢失，冲突文件会在本地文件夹生成包含被覆盖内容的 .conflict.md 备份文件。
